Class PreferenceVOMapper

java.lang.Object
org.openwms.core.preferences.PreferenceVOMapper
Direct Known Subclasses:
PreferenceVOMapperImpl
public abstract class PreferenceVOMapper extends Object
A PreferenceVOMapper maps between Preference (domain) and PreferenceVO (API VO).
Author:
Heiko Scherrer
